name: City Park Tennis Courts

name: Coralville Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Coralville Rec Center in Coralville, IA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: GreenState Family Fieldhouse
description: Come play pickleball at GreenState Family Fieldhouse in Coralville, IA! There are 15 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hawkeye Tennis and Recreation Complex
description: Hawkeye Tennis and Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Iowa City, IA. There are 9 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Iowa City, Scanlon Gym at Mercer Park
description: Come play pickleball at Iowa City, Scanlon Gym at Mercer Park in Iowa City, IA! There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Kirkwood Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Kirkwood Elementary School in Coralville, IA! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.

name: North Liberty, Penn Meadows Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at North Liberty, Penn Meadows Tennis Courts in North Liberty, IA! There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: North Liberty Recreation
description: North Liberty Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Liberty, IA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: North Liberty Recreation Center
description: North Liberty Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Liberty, IA. There are 5 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Penn Meadows Park
description: Come play pickleball at Penn Meadows Park in North Liberty, IA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Robert  A. Lee Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Robert A. Lee Rec Center in Iowa City, IA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Solon Community Center
description: Solon Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Solon, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Solon Recreation and Nature Area
description: Solon Recreation and Nature Area is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Solon, IA. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The Farmhouse
description: The Farmhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Iowa City, IA. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. You can’t reserve the court. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and food.
open_play_schedule: I will send out a note every Sunday to the group, but for the most part we will play Thursday evenings and Saturday and Sunday mornings.
fees: Private — This is a private residence

name: Tiffin City Park Tennis Courts
description: Tiffin City Park Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Tiffin, IA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
